title: Git Tags Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on Git releasing and tagging concepts.

questions.question: Which of these is the primary reason to use a Git tag?
options: To point to a specific, important point in your code's history like a software release

questions.question: Regarding Git tags, which one includes a descriptive message and is stored as a full object in the Git repository?
Which Git command is used to push a specific tag to a remote repository?
A situation where two or more transactions are waiting for each other to release a lock, resulting in a hang, is called a _______.
